title: ELEVATE - 211info
text: SPARK AT BOOTH KELLY ELEVATE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers career exploration and hands-on learning. Organizes hiring fairs, career expos, job shadows, and internships based on young people's interests, while giving them the tools and training they need to succeed at work. 303 S 5th Street Suite 150 Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Ages 14-24 Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 654-4095 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 654-4095 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Youth Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - DROP-IN SERVICES EMPLOYMENT - EXCELERATORS EMPLOYMENT - SPARK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
